title: BLADEZ DC Batman Sticker Activity Set - Creative Fun with Stickers & Colouring - Stickers for Children with Mini Card Figures & Pens - Perfect for Party Bags - 1 Pack
features: UNLEASH CREATIVITY - This DC Batman Sticker Craft Activity Set comes with 40+ pieces including stickers and colour-in card Batman figures, making it perfect for hours of creative fun!

IDEAL FOR ON-THE-GO FUN - Compact and easy to carry, this set is perfect for keeping young fans entertained anywhere. With sticker sheets, strips, and small colouring pages, it fits easily into any bag, making it an ideal sticker pack for travel.
PERFECT FOR PARTY BAGS - Ideal for party bags, these vibrant and fun sets make fantastic gifts. With stickers, colouring and pens included, they are perfect for all young superhero fans!
OFFICIALLY LICENSED DC - An authentic DC product, this set includes a card Batman for interactive play bringing Gotham City to life!
EACH SET INCLUDES: 2 x Card Characters, 3 x Sticker Sheets, 2 x Sticker Strips, 2 x Colour-in Sheets and 3 x Coloured Pens
description: Craft and customise with this Sticker Activity Set, including colour-in cardboard figure, felt tip pens and stickers.
